options.text: Can you drop this off at my desk? Thanks!
You can help me send this package, right?
Can you tell me where my package is?
I need you to send this package to my home

content.explanation: 正确答案：Can you drop this off at my desk? Thanks! 因为它是适合的场景提示和语言表达，其他选项不合适或表达不当
content.scenarioHint: 你想问前台能否帮你把快递送到办公室

options.text: Could you send this to Marketing? It's urgent.
How much does it cost to send a package?
Do you have any packages for me?

content.explanation: 正确答案是Could you send this to Marketing? It's urgent，因为它明确询问前台是否可以将快递送到市场部，并提到了急迫的需求。其他选项不符合场景要求或表达不当。
content.scenarioHint: 你想让前台帮忙把快递送到办公室，很急。

options.text: No problem. I'll drop it off by the HR door.
Why don't you just mail it?
I'm not allowed to go to HR.
Can you bring it to me later?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'No problem. I'll drop it off by the HR door.' 是自然、礼貌且符合职场惯例的回应。选项2和4推卸责任，选项3无理由拒绝，都不符合积极协助的职场文化。
content.speakerText: I have a package for HR. Could you deliver it to their office?
content.speakerTextCn: 我有个给人力资源部的包裹，你能送到他们办公室吗？
